# thoth_mdm_sync_job (Data Source)

Reads a specific MDM sync job by job_id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_id` (String) Sync job identifier.

### Read-Only

- `completed_at` (String) Job completion timestamp.
- `created_at` (String) Job creation timestamp.
- `error` (String) Error message for failed jobs.
- `job_json` (String) Raw job payload as JSON.
- `provider_name` (String) Provider slug.
- `started_at` (String) Job start timestamp.
- `status` (String) Job status.
- `synced_endpoints` (Number) Synced endpoint count.
- `unassigned_count` (Number) Unassigned device count.
- `updated_at` (String) Job update timestamp.
